name: Nam Phrik Kaeng Daeng (Red Curry Paste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried chilies in hot water for 15 minutes and remove the seeds.
2. In a wok over low heat, dry fry the coriander seeds and cumin seeds for about 5 minutes.
3. Grind the coriander seeds and cumin seeds into a powder.
4. Blend the remaining ingredients (except shrimp paste) until well mixed.
5. Add the coriander seed-cumin seed mixture and shrimp paste to the blender, then blend again to achieve a fine-textured paste.
6. Store the paste in a glass jar in the refrigerator for about 3-4 months.
Recipe from: The Elegant Taste of Thailand, by Sisamon Kongpan & Pinyo Srisawat.
